description_long: This object is a collection of industrial-style metal filing cabinets of varying sizes, arranged side by side. The cabinets are constructed from gray, slightly weathered metal, with each drawer featuring a rectangular label holder and a small pull handle. Some of the cabinets are tall and multi-drawer, while others are shorter and more compact, creating a staggered, modular appearance. Two desk lamps, one with a curved neck and another with a more traditional design, are placed atop the cabinets, adding a touch of utility and character. The surfaces of the cabinets are flat and robust, suitable for supporting additional office items. The overall look is utilitarian and functional, typical of storage furniture found in offices, archives, or industrial settings.
description: A group of gray metal filing cabinets with multiple drawers, label holders, and small pull handles, accompanied by two desk lamps on top. The cabinets have a rugged, industrial appearance and are arranged in a modular fashion.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the cabinets and the placement of the lamps on top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full array of drawers, label holders, and handles, as well as the arrangement of the cabinets and lamps.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the depth and staggered arrangement of the cabinets, with the lamps' profiles visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain backs of the cabinets and the backs of the lamps, with no visible drawers or handles.
